text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
At long last, these cleats of the<n>Overlord stand
alongside those of the<n>previous generation's
heroes!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
To the assassin, Doto—she who<n>sharpens her
blades in the<n>shadows—I declare that our swords
will clash at the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, I feel it! Astonishment, envy, and<n>alarm well
from within Doto, the<n>heroes of the old, and all
others.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... My true test as Overlord<n>begins now!
